preparation_method: boiled porridge (13% flour concentration, USDA-sourced, no regional validation — see data source notes)

notes: USDA-only diluted millet porridge — 13% flour analogy only; NOT regionally validated against Rwandan millet samples

preparation_method: stiff maize-meal paste (~30% w/v flour concentration), secondary-cited from Kenya FCT 2018 — not directly verified against primary source
